//: Shared VS Code workspace settings for CampusRPG. Toolchain selection is done via CMake Presets / CMake Kits instead of hard-coded paths.
// preset: Pick one preset matching your toolchain. VS Code will show available presets after opening the workspace. Build/test presets with the same name are selected automatically.
// kits: If you prefer CMake Kits over Presets, set cmake.useCMakePresets to 'never' and select a kit (Ctrl+Shift+P -> CMake: Select Kit).
